display_text: Apex, Cost: 0: Tier 5 neutral item granting a massive +40 bonus to a hero's primary attribute. For Universal heroes, it provides +24 to all attributes (Strength, Agility, Intelligence). This single scepter offers one of the highest attribute boosts in the game, significantly amplifying damage and survivability for most carries. Stats: Tier: 5, Primary Attribute: +40, Universal Attributes: +24 each.
